Dashboard v2 — not built

The Svelte dashboard hasn't been built yet. This is a stub committed to git so go:embed always has something to embed; the real assets land here when you run:

make build

That target chains npm install + npm run build in internal/web/ui/dashboard/ before the Go build, so the stub is overwritten with the real Svelte app.

Until then, the legacy dashboard at / is the active operator surface.
